description: secretx-bitwarden/Cargo.toml:20 declares 'uuid = { version = "1" }' as a bare dep. Every other dep in this Cargo.toml uses workspace = true. The workspace root's Cargo.toml does not currently include uuid in [workspace.dependencies] (verified). uuid is a direct dependency because we name uuid::Uuid in the type signatures of resolve_project_id, resolve_secret_id, and the OnceCell tuple — those signatures can't avoid naming the type since bitwarden's public APIs use uuid::Uuid. Fix: add 'uuid = "1"' to the workspace [workspace.dependencies] (must match the version bitwarden's transitive 'uuid v1.23.1' uses to avoid two uuid crates in the dep graph), then in this crate's Cargo.toml use 'uuid = { workspace = true }'. Workspace-wide dep policy consistency, not a runtime issue.
title: uuid is a direct dependency but not declared in [workspace.dependencies]
